basic_details.job_title: AMU Aligarh Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Aligarh Muslim University (AMU) has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official AMU website. Candidates holding an M.Tech./ M.E. or B.Tech./ B.E. in Electronics Engineering with a valid GATE/ GNET qualification in Electronics and Communication Engineering or an equivalent discipline are eligible to submit their offline applications on or before 25 July 2026. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to attend the walk-in interview on 28 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/ ME or B.Tech/ BE in Electronics Engineering, with GATE/ GNET qualification in Electronics and Communication Engg. or equivalent.
qualification.details: Project Assistant: M.Tech/ME or B.Tech/BE in Electronics Engineering, with GATE/GNET qualification in Electronics and Communication Engg. or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AMU Aligarh Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AMU Aligarh Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AMU Aligarh Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AMU Aligarh Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AMU Aligarh Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at AMU Aligarh?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Assistant position at Aligarh Muslim University is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of INR 23,200/- per month. This is a project-based role.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must possess an M.Tech/ME or B.Tech/BE in Electronics Engineering and have qualified GATE/GNET in Electronics and Communication Engineering or an equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send the hard copy to the specified address by the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there a walk-in interview for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, a walk-in interview is scheduled for 28th July 2026. Candidates are advised to be present at the venue on the specified date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant position announced by Aligarh Muslim University in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Department of Electronics Engineering at Aligarh Muslim University.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position is a project-based role, meaning it is tied to the duration and funding of a specific research project.

faq.question: Q9. Where should I send the hard copy of my application?
faq.answer: The hard copy of the application form should be sent to the office of the Chairperson, Department of Electronics Engineering, Aligarh Muslim University, Aligarh, 202002 U.P.

faq.question: Q10. Do I need to send a soft copy of the application as well?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must also send the scanned soft copy of the application form along with supporting documents to [email protected] with a specific subject line.
